name: risk_register_default
description: Cross-project open-risk register: 3 risks spanning Orion and Atlas with severity + owner + mitigation.

risks.title: Tax-jar API rate limits
risks.mitigation: Tier upgrade in flight; backup local computation as fallback.

risks.title: PDF rendering perf on 100+ pages
risks.mitigation: Streaming render; cap MVP at 50 pages.

risks.title: SAML metadata churn from IdP vendors
risks.mitigation: Contract tests against top 5 IdPs; alert on schema drift.
